html:
Cut Grass is a renewable resource Item harvested from Grass Tufts found naturally in the world. It can be used on numerous starter recipes and in even more advanced items when refined into Rope.

Because Cut Grass is needed to craft Campfires and Torches, it is a valuable early-game resource to collect. A player who does not collect cut grass on their first day may have no means for making a fire at night.

In Winter, Cut Grass becomes a non-renewable resource, as harvested Grass Tufts will not regrow until Winter ends.

Cut Grass can be fed to Beefalo to restore 10 Health and 10 Hunger.

Downloadable Content

In all DLCs, more crafting recipes require Cut Grass. Cut Grass can also be gained from crops on a Farm that is destroyed by the heat during Summer or Dry Season. Grass Tufts wither during these seasons unless protected by an Ice Flingomatic or located in a Mangrove biome, reducing access to Cut Grass.

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Cut Grass drops from all Tumbleweeds, making it renewable even if the player burns all the spawned Grass Tufts.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Cut Grass and Grass Tufts appear greener, however their function is identical. Cut Grass may be dropped by the Slot Machine when three carrots are rolled.

In the Hamlet DLC, Cut Grass is required to craft Lawn Turf and Beard Hair Rugs. It can be acquired by cutting down Tall Grass with a Machete, yielding 1 Cut Grass, or by clipping it with Shears, yielding 2 Cut Grass. It may also be dropped when Hammering A Smashing Pot.

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

"cutgrass"
“Cut grass, ready for arts and crafts.”
–Wilson
“Cut grass, ready for burning. Or maybe crafting.”
–Willow
“I made a pile of grass.”
–Wolfgang
“I like to kill small things.”
–Wendy
“PLANT MATTER”
–WX-78
“Some grass cuttings.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think I might be allergic to this.”
–Woodie
“The mundane stuff of the earth.”
–Maxwell
“I've never seen such tensile strength in a grass before!”
–Wagstaff
“A craftwöman's möst elemental resöurce.”
–Wigfrid
“We should be able to weave this, too.”
–Webber
“It makes a swishing sound when I walk.”
–Walani
“What shall I craft?”
–Warly
“Ye'll be helpin' Woodlegs later.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS GRASS”
–Wilba
“Hair from friends!”
–Wormwood
“These are more useful when there's more of them.”
–Wheeler
“A fire waiting to happen.”
–Winona
“Oh, what I could weave!”
–Wortox
“It grass.”
–Wurt
“Look, I can make a whistle with it! PHHWEEEE!”
–Walter
“It's about as interesting as you'd imagine cut grass to be.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cỏ Cắt là một loại tài nguyên có thể tái tạo được, được thu hoạch từ các Búi Cỏ được tìm thấy tự nhiên trên thế giới. Nó có thể được sử dụng trong nhiều công thức nấu ăn ban đầu và thậm chí trong các vật phẩm cao cấp hơn khi được tinh chế thành Dây.
